design_system.description: A luxury, masculine, and sophisticated design language that combines deep obsidian backgrounds with matte gold accents. It evokes the feeling of a high-end private club or a bespoke tailor shop.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(18, 18, 18, 0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use gap-8, gap-12, py-24 for sections to create luxury breathing room.
layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Asymmetrical). Avoid equal squares. Use col-span-2 or row-span-2 to create hierarchy.

buttons.primary: bg-gold text-obsidian font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-gold-muted transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gold/30 text-gold px-8 py-3 rounded-sm hover:border-gold hover:bg-gold/5 transition-all duration-300

cards.style: bg-obsidian-light border border-white/5 rounded-md p-6 hover:border-gold/30 transition-all duration-500 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.hover_effect: Add a subtle golden glow or lift on hover.

inputs.style: bg-obsidian-lighter border-b border-white/10 focus:border-gold px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-zinc-600 focus:outline-none transition-all rounded-t-sm

animation.entrance: Fade up with delay. 'motion.div initial={{opacity: 0, y: 20}} animate={{opacity: 1, y: 0}}'

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) to maintain elegance.

setup: Install dependencies: npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
Update tailwind.config.js with the colors.obsidian and colors.gold palette.
Add the Google Fonts import to index.css.
Set the body background to bg-obsidian text-text_primary.

landing_page.structure: Hero (Full height, img background with gradient overlay) -> Value Prop (Bento Grid) -> How it Works (Step by Step) -> Testimonials -> CTA
landing_page.vibe: Cinematic. Use the 'man in black suit' image as a hero background. Text should be Gold and White.

dashboard.widgets: Dark cards with gold numbers. Use charts with gold/white strokes (no rainbows).
dashboard.upload_section: A designated 'Drop Zone' that looks like a high-tech scanner. Use a dashed gold border.

results_page.structure: Editorial Magazine Layout. Large typography for the 'Verdict'.
results_page.details: Use progress bars styled as thin gold lines. Recommendations should look like product cards in a luxury catalog.

universal_rules: NEVER use rounded-full for buttons unless it's a specific 'pill' design. Prefer rounded-sm or rounded-md for a sharper, masculine look.
Always add data-testid to interactive elements.
